titleStmt.title: SII 26.497: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 497. (A.R. No. 473 of 1909.) ĀḺVĀR-TIRUNAGARI, TIRUCHENDUR TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Main gōpura of the same temple, left of entrance.

p.hi: [Kollam] Year 722, Mīṉa (Paṅguṉi) ba. 5. Saturday, Pūśam = Irregular (?) (= 1547-48 A.D.).

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in several places.

It records a sale of land along with all associated items like tanks, wells, shrub jungles, groves, etc., in Tiruvaḷudi-vaḷanāḍu, to Śrīmāṉmahāmaṇḍalēśvara Irāmarāya Śiṉṉattimmaya-deyva-maharājā, by the Śiṟaivāy Mūttavar Śaṅkaranārāyaṇa Veṉṟumaṇkoṇḍa Būtalavīra Śrī-Udaiyamāttāṇḍavaṉmar Śeyātuṅga-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu Aruḷicceyal 7 100 2 10 2 varuṣam miṉa nāyaṟṟuaparapakṣattu pañcamiyum caṉi Āṭcaiyum peṟṟa pūcattunāḷ ceyatuṅkanāṭṭu caṅkaranārāyaṇa
veṉṟumaṇkoṇṭa pūtalavira śrīutaiyamāttāṇṭavaṉmar citaivāy muttavarāyanām śrīmaṉmahāmaṇṭaleśvara Irāmarāya ciṉṉat
ttimmayateyva mahārājā Avarkaḷukku tecam vilai Eḻutikkuṭutta paricāvatu I nāṟpattu
Ayyāyirattukku nām vilai Eḻutikkuṭutta Ūrāvatu tiruvaḻutivaḷanāṭṭil ttukkum I
kaṭṭiṉa mallal putukkuḷattukkum perunāṉku Elkai Āvatu kiḻ Elkai Āḻvār tiruvuṭaiyāṭṭattukkum
kuḷattukkum meṟku teṉ Elkai vākaikkuḷattut teṉ Elkaikkum mallal putukkuḷattu teṉ Elkaikkum vaṭakku mel Elkai mallal putuk
kuḷattu mel Elkaikkum putukkuḷattu mel Elkaikkum nayiṉār vaika tiruvuṭai Āṭṭamāṉa vallaik kuḷattu
kkiḻ Ellaikkum I lūr kiḷākkuḷattil mel Elkaikkum vī kālukkum vaṭakku Āḻvār tiruvuṭaiyāṭṭa
māṉa cciyaṉ kuḷattil kiḻ Elkaikkum kiḻakku vaṭaelkai ppokiṟa vatikkut teṟku Āka Iṉṉāṉ Elkai
kkuḷpaṭṭa kuḷamum puravum puṉkkuḷaṅkaḷum vāvikaḷum karaikkāṭukaḷum toṭṭakkaḷum māyvaṭai maravaṭaiyum cekkiṟai taṟikkaṭamai maṟṟum nām ko
ḷḷum koḷmuṟaipāṭu Eṟpeppaṭṭa samasataprāptikaḷum Āticcamanallūrilc ceva
muṉṉāḷviṭṭa tevatā(ā)ya brahmatāyamum ceṉṉa Āḻvāṟku tirunāmattukkāṇi Aññūṟu koṭṭai nellum
koḷḷumpaṭi śrīmaṉmahāmaṇṭaleśvara Irāmarāya
ciṉṉat timmatevamahārājā Avarkaḷukku vīramātāṇṭavaṉmarāya ciṟaivāy mūtta varāya nām Ippaṭikku Irāmaṉ Irāmaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 26.497 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
